title: Active Segment Schema
description: Schema for active segment instances in Eidolon Engine

ActiveSegmentID.description: Unique identifier for the active segment instance (UUIDv7)

CharacterID.description: UUID of the character playing this segment

PlayerID.description: UUID of the player who owns the character

StoryID.description: Identifier of the story being played

SegmentID.description: Identifier of the segment definition from the Segments table

SegmentType.description: Type of segment (mechanical, decision, combat, etc.)

SegmentTitle.description: Title of the segment for display

SegmentActivity.description: Activity description for display during segment

StartTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the segment started

EndTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the segment ends/ended

ProcessedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the segment was processed

CompletedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the segment completed

ClientEvents.description: Events to display to the client during segment

EventType.description: Type of event (narrative, decision, combat, etc.)

Description.description: Description or content of the event

CharacterUpdates.description: Character field updates from segment completion

SkillXPAwarded.description: Skill XP awarded during this segment

AttributeXPAwarded.description: Attribute XP awarded during this segment

ChallengeResults.description: Results from skill challenges in this segment

CombatState.description: Combat state data if segment includes combat
